mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ops_ro_barcode( ro_id, ro_item, InvoiceNo, warehouse_code, barCode, package_code, modelno, qty, orderNo, itemNo,splitItemNo, SN, delflag, cre_time, creator,InvoiceId) values
( #{item.roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.roItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{item.invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.packageCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.qty,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{item.orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{item.splititemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.sn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{item.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{item.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{item.invoiceid,jdbcType=BIGINT} )
